name: components/config-provider
description: A global locale and configuration context provider that passes i18n settings to all downstream shadcn-solid components. Exposes ConfigProvider and useLocale hooks so that date formats, number formats, ARIA labels, and component copy can be adapted to the user's language. Accepts a Partial<Locale> object and is typically placed at the application root alongside ThemeProvider.
useCases: Internationalized applications that switch between English, Chinese, Japanese, and other locales
Multi-tenant SaaS platforms where each tenant configures regional format preferences
SSR-friendly apps that hydrate locale state from server-rendered Accept-Language headers
Date-picker and number-field components that require localized formatting and month names
